perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black vest over a white shirt is standing in a Costco warehouse store. She holds up a large purple box of 'Great Day Taro Coconut Soup with Oats' and points to it with excitement. (2) The camera zooms in on the product box, detailing the 'Quaker' brand and serving suggestions. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor dining setting. Two women are sitting at a table with a bowl of the taro soup. They use spoons to show the thick texture and ingredients (taro chunks and oats). They give thumbs-up gestures and smile broadly at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat and energetic electronic background music begins. A high-pitched, enthusiastic female voice speaks in Mandarin, introducing a new product at Costco. Ambient sounds of a busy warehouse can be heard faintly. (2) As the scene transitions, a second female voice is heard joining the discussion with equal excitement. (3) The audio remains clear as they taste the food; soft clinking of spoons against the bowl and more vocal expressions of satisfaction ('Mmm', 'Oh') are heard. Bright sound effects like 'dings' and 'pops' are used to emphasize text appearances.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in Traditional Chinese translating the speakers' dialogue about the taro coconut soup. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: Large, colorful titles appear including 'COSTCO WHOLESALE', '話題必買新品' (Must-buy new products), '滿分10分!' (Full marks 10 points!), and '沒有業配真的好吃' (No sponsorship, really delicious). These have an enthusiastic and encouraging tone.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Product close-up -> In-home tasting and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators shown throughout the review.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair and wears a black vest; the other has black hair with purple ribbons and wears a teal turtleneck.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse with tall shelving units and pallet-stacked goods; followed by a home dining room with a wooden table, shelving, and a TV.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright commercial lighting and warm domestic lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Product Features -> Tasting Test -> Rating/Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to provide a highly positive, authentic review of a new dessert product found at Costco Taiwan. By showing the purchase in-store and then doing a detailed taste test at home, the creators aim to influence their audience to buy the product based on its flavor and convenience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators explicitly state in the text and dialogue that there is 'No sponsorship' (沒有業配).

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy presentation style common in Taiwanese lifestyle vlogs, combined with variety-show style dynamic text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The use of 'No sponsorship' claims is a common tactic to build trust with the audience, emphasizing authenticity in the clustering of user-generated reviews.
